text.tspan: Consumption-based Kaya Identity: drivers of CO₂ emissions, United
Percentage change in the four parameters of the Kaya Identity, which determine total CO₂ emissions. Consumption-based
metrics adjust for the energy or emissions embedded in traded goods: it is the energy or emissions used domestically minus
exported goods; plus the energy or emissions from imported goods.
Source: Calculated by Viktoras Kulionis, based on the EXIOBASE v3.8.2 database, Global Carbon Project, Data compiled from multiple sources
by World Bank, Gapminder (v6), HYDE (v3.2), UN (2019)
